  "findings": [
    "Missing load reactor on long motor leads",
    "Risk of reflected wave phenomenon (dv/dt) causing motor insulation breakdown",
    "Potential for premature motor failure and VFD overcurrent trips"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an appropriately rated output/load reactor or dv/dt filter between the VFD and the motor",
    "Verify maximum lead length limits specified by the VFD manufacturer"
  ],
  "rationale": "The installation of long motor leads without a load reactor violates manufacturer installation guidelines and poses a high risk of motor insulation failure due to transient voltage spikes (reflected wave phenomenon). The installation cannot pass inspection in this state.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 430.120",
    "VFD Manufacturer Installation Manuals"
  ]
}
